subcodes.title: Words to a Russian princess, spoken on 1913-10-30
subcodes.first_line: A Bahá'í is at the same time a Christian, a Jew, a Zoroastrian and a Mohammadan. The Bahá'í Cause is like unto a tree... Every moment in this world has a center.
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @unity in diversity, @Manifestation of God as sun, @universality of the Cause
